headline: Microchip Technology Seeing Early Signs Of The Upswing
summary: Microchip (MCHP) Strong Buy: $145 target on data center, A&D and auto growth. Data center-specific content sales are projected to surge. See more here.

headline: Jim Cramer: This Tech Stock Is 'Terrific,' Fluence Faces Profit Test
summary: "Mad Money's" Jim Cramer recommends Microchip Technology, citing strong financial results and potential for growth.
